title: Sweet Sophisticated Croatian Puff Pastry Bake
description: A resinous, crumbly, and nostalgic Croatian dish featuring coco sugar and lamination-puff, this paleo-friendly pastry is perfect for special occasions. It combines the richness of coconut sugar with the flakiness of puff pastry.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the coco sugar, almond flour, and salt.
Add the coconut oil, eggs, and vanilla extract to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the puff pastry and place it on a baking sheet.
Spread the dough mixture over the puff pastry, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the puff pastry up over the dough to form a crust.
Brush the crust with a little bit of coconut oil and sprinkle with coco sugar.
Bake the pastry for 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let the pastry cool for 10 minutes before serving.
